seo.title: Mobile Web / PWA implementation checklist
seo.description: A practical checklist for shipping Mobile Web / PWA projects safely.

content.intro: This checklist provides a technical roadmap for moving a web application to a production-ready Progressive Web App (PWA). It focuses on service worker reliability, cross-platform installation, and mobile-specific performance constraints.

items.title: Register Service Worker on Load
items.description: Ensure the service worker is registered after the window 'load' event to avoid competing with main thread resources during initial paint.

items.title: Implement Offline Fallback Page
items.description: Configure a specific offline.html file in the cache that displays when the user is offline and the requested page is not in the cache.

items.title: Versioned Cache Keys
items.description: Prefix cache names with a version string (e.g., v1, v2) to facilitate cache purging and prevent stale assets from persisting after updates.

items.title: Cache-First Strategy for Static Assets
items.description: Apply a Cache-First (Cache Falling Back to Network) strategy for images, fonts, and CSS using Workbox or native Fetch API.

items.title: Stale-While-Revalidate for API Routes
items.description: Implement Stale-While-Revalidate for dynamic content to show immediate data while updating the cache in the background.

items.title: Handle Service Worker Updates
items.description: Implement a UI notification or automatic reload logic when a new service worker is waiting to ensure users don't run old code.

items.title: Validate Manifest.json Fields
items.description: Verify the presence of 'short_name', 'name', 'start_url', 'display' (standalone or minimal-ui), and 'background_color'.

items.title: Provide 512x512 and 192x192 Icons
items.description: Include PNG icons in both sizes to satisfy Android and Chrome installation requirements.

items.title: Define Maskable Icons
items.description: Add the 'purpose': 'maskable' attribute to at least one icon to ensure proper rendering on Android adaptive icon systems.

items.title: Set Theme Color Meta Tag
items.description: Match the 'theme_color' in the manifest with the HTML meta name='theme-color' tag for browser UI consistency.

items.title: Custom Install Prompt Logic
items.description: Intercept the 'beforeinstallprompt' event to provide a custom UI button rather than relying on browser defaults.

items.title: Eliminate Render-Blocking CSS
items.description: Inline critical CSS in the <head> and defer non-critical styles using media='print' or rel='preload'.

items.title: Implement Image Lazy Loading
items.description: Use the loading='lazy' attribute on all non-hero images to reduce initial payload and CPU usage.

items.title: Preconnect to Critical Origins
items.description: Add <link rel='preconnect'> for third-party domains like fonts or API endpoints to reduce DNS/TCP handshake latency.

items.title: Enforce Font-Display: Swap
items.description: Ensure all @font-face declarations include font-display: swap to prevent invisible text during font loading.

items.title: Limit JavaScript Bundle Size
items.description: Keep the main thread execution time under 2 seconds on a mid-tier mobile device (e.g., Moto G4) via code splitting.

items.title: Set Viewport Meta Tag
items.description: Ensure <meta name='viewport' content='width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover'> is present for iOS notched devices.

items.title: Apply Safe Area Insets
items.description: Use CSS environment variables (env(safe-area-inset-bottom)) to prevent UI elements from overlapping system bars.

items.title: Disable Double-Tap Zoom
items.description: Set touch-action: manipulation on interactive elements to remove the 300ms tap delay in mobile browsers.

items.title: Implement Skeleton Screens
items.description: Replace generic loading spinners with CSS skeleton screens that mirror the layout structure to improve perceived performance.

items.title: Provide Visual Touch Feedback
items.description: Use CSS :active states or ripple effects to confirm user input on buttons and navigation links.

items.title: VAPID Key Configuration
items.description: Generate and secure Voluntarily Identified Public Key (VAPID) pairs for authenticating push subscriptions.

items.title: Deferred Permission Request
items.description: Trigger the notification permission request after a user action (e.g., clicking a 'Notify Me' button) rather than on page load.

items.title: Handle Notification Clicks
items.description: Add a 'notificationclick' event listener in the service worker to focus the existing window or open a specific deep-link URL.

items.title: iOS Push Support Validation
items.description: Verify the app supports the Web Push API for iOS 16.4+ when the app is added to the home screen.

items.title: Payload Size Verification
items.description: Ensure push notification payloads remain under 4KB to comply with browser vendor limitations.
